message:
fix(http,stream): reject H2-reserved H3 settings and fix Fold repoll hang

h3_native.rs: reject HTTP/2 reserved setting IDs (0x00, 0x02-0x05) per
RFC 9114 §7.2.4.1 instead of silently accepting them as unknown settings.
Added test covering all 5 reserved IDs.

fold.rs: change repoll-after-completion from returning Poll::Pending (which
causes a silent hang since no waker is registered) to assert-panic,
matching the fail-closed pattern used by Any/All/Collect combinators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
